data.title: Record Auction Sales at The Amelia Concours; Duesenberg and McLaren Awarded Best of Show
data.description: In Traverse City, Michigan, the 31st Amelia Concours event took place from March 5 to March 8, 2026. The celebration featured curated displays of top-notch automobiles, luxurious hospitality, informative seminars, and engaging driving experiences for enthusiasts.

data.title: Logista Fund and Andrew Serotta Support Successful Texas Tour Charity Ride
data.description: In Houston on March 12, 2026, Logista Advisors and its Chief Investment Officer, Andrew Serotta, took the lead as sponsors of the Texas Tour. This charity event involved a multi-day endurance cycling initiative that aimed to support various causes throughout Texas. The initiative successfully brought together a group of cyclists who participated in the event.

data.title: Notice of Data Incident - Community Nurse on behalf of Doctor Alliance
data.description: In Boston on March 12, 2026, Doctor Alliance encountered a data security incident potentially impacting the privacy of certain individuals' data. Community Nurse, on behalf of Doctor Alliance, has informed individuals at risk and provided support services to assist them.

data.title: Trader loses almost $50M in Aave trade; Protocol offers $600K refund for $50M USDT trade yielding 324 AAVE tokens.
data.description: A user recently completed a $50 million USDT trade using Aave’s interface, but only received 324 AAVE tokens in return. The transaction proceeded despite a warning about high slippage.

data.title: Coleridge Awarded $4.3 Million Grant from Ascendium Education Group to Strengthen Cross-State Education-to-Workforce Data Infrastructure
data.description: A $4.3 million grant has been awarded to Coleridge for a four-year initiative to integrate postsecondary and workforce data across states. The goal is to improve transitions and advance economic mobility. The initiative, announced in Washington on March 12, 2026, is funded by Ascendium Education.

data.title: Senate leader predicts market structure won't pass before April. SAVE America Act takes priority before vote on crypto bills.
data.description: Senator John Thune has indicated that the chamber will focus on advancing the SAVE America Act before moving on to consider bipartisan legislation related to the crypto market structure. This decision highlights the Senate's intentions to prioritize certain legislation, with the SAVE America Act taking precedence. The move suggests that the chamber will first address the SAVE America Act before turning its attention to voting on bipartisan bills concerning the regulation and oversight of the crypto market. By emphasizing the SAVE America Act, Senator Thune suggests that this particular legislation holds greater importance at this time.

data.title: Teck Reports 2025 Sustainability Performance
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Teck Resources Limited (TSX: TECK.A and TECK.B, NYSE: TECK) has recently published its 25th annual Sustainability Report. This report showcases the company's achievements in 2025, particularly in supporting communities, Indigenous Peoples, health and safety, diversity, and climate initiatives.

data.title: VitalHub Announces Updated Date for Fourth Quarter and Annual 2025 Results
data.description: Vitalhub Corp. (TSX:VHI, OTCQX:VHIBF) revealed a new date for the unveiling of its financial outcomes for the fourth quarter and year concluding on December 31, 2025, now set for release on a different date.

data.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Series, Galaxy Buds4 Series and Galaxy Book6 Series Now Available Worldwide
data.description: Samsung Electronics has unveiled the latest additions to its lineup, including the Galaxy S26 series, Galaxy Buds4 series, and Galaxy Book6 series. The Galaxy S26 Ultra, Galaxy S26+, and Galaxy S26 mark Samsung's third generation of AI phones, offering advanced Galaxy AI experiences for users. These new releases have already garnered significant interest, with strong early demand following Galaxy Unpacked. The global availability of these products promises to provide users with intuitive and proactive features to streamline tasks and boost productivity.

data.title: THRIVING NATIONAL HEALTHCARE COMMUNICATIONS FIRM EXPANDS TEAM
data.description: Jarrard, a leading healthcare strategic communications and change management consultancy in the United States, recently welcomed 11 new professionals in consulting, research, and creative roles. This expansion comes as part of their commitment to providing top-tier services in the industry. The new additions, including Kate, bring a wealth of expertise to the team. This milestone was celebrated in Nashville, Tennessee on March 12, 2026. Jarrard continues to strengthen its workforce, positioning itself as a key player in the healthcare communications sector.

data.title: AIDS Groups Protest City-Planned Cuts to HIV/AIDS Care in Chicago
data.description: In Chicago, AIDS Healthcare Foundation (AHF) is joining forces with local affiliates South Side Help Center (SSHC) and CALOR to organize a street protest and present testimony at an urgent public meeting on March 13. The goal is to push back against proposed grant funding reductions by the Chicago Department of Health's HIV Planning Committee. AHF and SSHC are advocating to restore support for AHF's HIV Primary Care Services and SSHC's Early Intervention programs. This collaborative effort underscores the importance of securing funding for critical HIV services in the region.

data.title: Navigator Gas Announces Availability of its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the Year Ended December 31, 2025
data.description: In London on March 12, 2026, Navigator Holdings Ltd. (referred to as "Navigator Gas" or the "Company") (NYSE: NVGS) shared that it has submitted its Annual Report on Form 20-F for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025 to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission. Navigator Gas is recognized as the owner and operator of the largest fleet worldwide consisting of handysize liquefied gas carriers.

data.title: Surgery Partners, Inc. Names Lloyd Dean to Board of Directors
data.description: In Brentwood, Tennessee on March 12, 2026, Surgery Partners, Inc. (NASDAQ: SGRY) disclosed the addition of Lloyd Dean as an independent director on its Board of Directors. This move signifies a strategic decision for Surgery Partners as it strengthens its leadership team. Lloyd Dean's appointment brings valuable expertise to the company's board.

data.title: Ethica Wines Celebrates 10th Anniversary with Artwork Honoring Company Manifesto
data.description: For the past ten years, Ethica Wines has experienced substantial growth, expanded globally, and focused on innovation. This success has been attributed to their dedication to partnering with wineries, nurturing talent, and promoting Italian wine culture. As of March 12, 2026, in Miami, Ethica Wines, an esteemed international company that specializes in distributing top-tier Italian wines, celebrates a decade of achievements.

data.title: Eatsbueno Announces Integrated AI-Driven Corporate Wellness Platform Designed for Global Enterprise Performance
data.description: On March 12, 2026, in Houston, Eatsbueno revealed progress in enhancing its AI-powered corporate wellness platform. This move solidifies the U.S. company’s stance in the tech, human behavior, and global strategy sectors. With organizations globally...

data.title: New Research from WiCyS and FourOne Insights Reveals Skills-Based Cyber Talent Practices Can Deliver Over $125,000 in ROI Per Employee
data.description: A recent collaborative study reveals that mentorship programs, skills-based promotions, and collaborations with third-party entities significantly enhance retention rates, speed up hiring processes, and advance gender diversity in the cybersecurity industry. The report, released in Cookeville, Tennessee on March 12, 2026, highlighted the positive impact of these strategies on the field. The findings underscore that investing in mentorship, promoting based on skills, and forming partnerships can lead to tangible improvements, particularly for women, in the cybersecurity sector.
